achievements.title: I Was In The Mississippi River
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: I Was In Salt Lake City
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Captain America's Got The Power
achievements.description: Upgrade Captain's power level to full.
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: Hawkeye's Got The power
achievements.description: Upgrade Hawkeye's power level to full.
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: The Avengers!
achievements.description: Upgrade Captain's and Hawkeye's power level to full.
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: Infinity Stones
achievements.description: Collect 99 power stones at max level for both Captain and Hawkeye.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Easy Alarm
achievements.description: Complete Red Alert (type 1) without taking damage
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: The Hero Is Here
achievements.description: Complete Red Alert (Dynamite Napalm) without taking damage
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: The Alarm Is Canceled
achievements.description: Complete Red Alert (Dynamite Napalm and Fire Man) without taking damage
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: Challenge Accepted
achievements.description: Complete Red Alert (type 2) without taking damage
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: Crossbones Will Be Back
achievements.description: Defeat Crossbones in Salt Lake City without taking damage.
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: BOOM!
achievements.description: Defeat Dynamite Napalm in Avengers Park without taking damage.
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: Does Not Burn
achievements.description: Defeat Fire Man in Avengers Park without taking damage.
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: Zest For Success
achievements.description: Defeat Mandarin in Avengers Park without taking damage.
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: Flawless Victory
achievements.description: Defeat Red skull without taking damage
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: Bop It!
achievements.description: Open 50% of the canisters in the game.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Punch It!
achievements.description: Open 75% of the total canisters in the game.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: Thorough Opener
achievements.description: Open 100% of the 404 canisters located throughout the game.
achievements.author: Wulden

achievements.title: We Will Not Be Caught
achievements.description: Complete the game without using continue
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: The Avenger
achievements.description: Complete the game only by Captain (Do not pick Hawkeye)
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: Red Skull Will Lose
achievements.description: Complete the game without losing a life
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: No Need For Power Stones
achievements.description: Complete the game without upgrading a power level for any character.
achievements.author: BroDMax

achievements.title: No Turning Back
achievements.description: Complete the game without revisiting a city on the map, and without "returning" from a city.
achievements.author: Wulden
